title: Seeing a Doctor
scene: 你感冒发烧，去医院看门诊。

turns.en: What seems to be the problem?
I've had a fever and cough for three days.

turns.cn: 张嘴说「啊」，我检查一下喉咙。
turns.en: Open your mouth and say ah. Let me check your throat.

turns.cn: 喉咙很痛，吃东西也困难。
turns.en: My throat hurts a lot. It's hard to swallow.

turns.cn: 是病毒感染，多休息多喝水。
turns.en: It's a viral infection. Get plenty of rest and drink fluids.
Do I need antibiotics?

turns.cn: 不需要，这是处方药，一天三次。
turns.en: No. Take this prescription three times a day.

title: Emergency Room
scene: 你摔伤了脚踝，来急诊室。

turns.en: What happened? Where does it hurt?
I fell down and my ankle is swollen.

turns.cn: 疼痛等级一到十，你打几分？
turns.en: On a scale of one to ten, how bad is the pain?
About seven or eight. It hurts to walk.
Please take a wheelchair. The doctor will see you shortly.
Will I need an X-ray?

turns.cn: 医生会判断，先填一下这张表。
turns.en: The doctor will decide. Please fill out this form first.

turns.cn: 社区医院，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Community Clinic. How can I help you?
I'd like to schedule an annual physical exam.
Do you have your insurance card number?

turns.cn: 有的，下周四上午有空吗？
turns.en: Yes. Do you have anything next Thursday morning?
Nine o'clock works. You'll need to fast beforehand.
Okay. How early should I arrive?

turns.cn: 提前十五分钟，带身份证和保险卡。
turns.en: Fifteen minutes early, with your ID and insurance card.

title: Picking Up Prescription
scene: 你在医院药房取处方药。

turns.en: Hi, are you picking up a prescription?
Yes, last name Zhang.

turns.cn: 一天两次，饭后服用，共七天。
turns.en: Take it twice a day after meals for seven days.
Are there any side effects?
It may cause drowsiness. Don't drive.
Can I take it with cold medicine?

turns.cn: 最好先问我，有些不能混用。
turns.en: Ask me first. Some combinations aren't safe.

title: Follow-up Visit
scene: 你按预约来医院复查，向医生说明恢复情况。

turns.cn: 张先生，上次感冒后感觉怎么样？
turns.en: Mr. Zhang, how have you been since the cold?

turns.cn: 咳嗽好多了，但偶尔还会头晕。
turns.en: The cough is much better, but I still feel dizzy sometimes.
Are you still taking the medicine? How often?

turns.cn: 一天三次，昨天忘了一次。
turns.en: Three times a day. I missed one dose yesterday.

turns.cn: 尽量按时吃。我听听心肺。
turns.en: Try to stay on schedule. Let me listen to your heart and lungs.
Do I need another blood test?

turns.cn: 不用，两周后若无症状可以停药。
turns.en: No. You can stop the medicine in two weeks if you feel fine.

title: Clinic Check-In
scene: 你到医院诊所前台签到，职员说话很快。

turns.cn: 预约时间？保险卡请刷一下。
turns.en: Appointment time? Swipe your insurance card.

turns.cn: 三点，张伟。能再说一遍要刷什么吗？
turns.en: Three PM, Zhang Wei. What did I need to swipe again?

turns.cn: 保险卡，背面或正面芯片。
turns.en: Insurance card, chip or magnetic strip.
What's my copay?
Thirty for specialist. Please wait in the lobby.
Will the nurse call my name?
Yes. Listen for the announcement.

title: Blood Draw
scene: 护士给你抽血，你紧张并确认空腹。

turns.en: You fasted, right? Left arm, please.

turns.cn: 对，昨晚八点后就没吃。有点怕针。
turns.en: Yes, nothing since eight PM. I'm a bit nervous.
Relax. Quick pinch. Look away.
How many days for results?
Two to three days in the patient portal.
Thank you.

title: Insurance Not Accepted
scene: 前台说你的保险不在网络内，你询问选项。

turns.en: Your plan is out-of-network. You'll pay more out of pocket.

turns.cn: 大概多多少？能写清楚吗？
turns.en: About how much more? Could you break it down?

turns.cn: 估计多一百到两百，看项目。
turns.en: Roughly a hundred to two hundred extra, depending on services.

turns.cn: 能今天先看，账单以后再付吗？
turns.en: Can I still be seen today and pay the bill later?
Yes. Sign a financial agreement.
Okay. I'll sign.

title: Urgent Care Wait Time
scene: 你在 urgent care 问要等多久。

turns.cn: 目前等候大约四十五分钟。
turns.en: Current wait is about forty-five minutes.

turns.cn: 能先做登记吗？我喉咙很痛。
turns.en: Can I check in now? My throat really hurts.
Fill this out. ID and insurance card.
It's cheaper than the ER, right?

turns.cn: 一般是的，严重情况会去急诊。
turns.en: Usually yes. Severe cases go to the ER.
Okay. I'll wait.

title: Prescription at Hospital Pharmacy
scene: 医生开药后，你在院内药房取药。

turns.cn: 张伟？抗生素，饭后吃，每天两次。
turns.en: Zhang Wei? Antibiotic with food, twice daily.
How long do I take it? Could you slow down?

turns.cn: 七天，即使好了也要吃完。
turns.en: Seven days. Finish even if you feel better.
Fifteen-dollar copay, right?
Yes. Card here.
Thanks.
